name: Coconut-Cranberry Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream cheese, cranberry sauce, flaked coconut, and orange rind in a bowl.
2. Stir until well blended.
3. Spoon the mixture into a serving dish.
4. Sprinkle with additional flaked coconut.
5. Serve the spread with gingersnaps.
Yield: 1 1/4 cups
